TJ: Glaciated peaks above deep fault trenches; grey torrents in narrow intermontane corridors
TL: Steep ridges above coral coasts; weathered schist slopes under heavy seasonal rains
TM: Sand seas with yardangs; northern fold foothills above flat interior playas
TN: Fault blocks between salt chotts; north coastal limestone scarps in maquis scrub
TO: Linear volcanic chain on an oceanic ridge; fringing reef rings around steep basalt islands
TR: Interior volcano plateau; humid folded ranges along a northern coastal escarpment
TT: Mud volcanoes on delta flats; forested scarps above mangrove shelf coasts
TV: Nine low coral atolls on a broad swell; motu on lagoon rims barely above spring high tides
TW: Metamorphic spine with east sea cliffs; broad west alluvial fans toward narrow straits
TZ: Savanna plateaus with volcanic cones; rift troughs holding soda lakes and swamp fringes
UA: Loess on chernozem steppe; river gorges at plateau rim to black-earth plains
UG: Rift-block icefields west; rolling plateau east to wide shallow lake embayments
US: Braided megafans on interior plains; cordilleran snow on Pacific fault scarps
UY: Grass swells and coastal lagoons; granite boulder beaches on Atlantic headlands
UZ: Sand desert flanked by oasis ribbons; shrinking lake mudflats with tamarisk belts
VA: Limestone hill in urban river bend; terraced slopes above cliffside crypt galleries
VC: Young cone above wet forest; reef islets on a drowned volcanic chain
VE: Sandstone plateaus with cliff rims; broad llanos floods over braided sand channels
VN: Tower karst along forested ranges; monsoon megafan channels across muddy delta flats
VU: Volcanic arc on convergent margin; cyclone surf through windward reef passes
WS: Basalt peaks with radial streams; reef moats and tombolo bars on trade shores
XK: Forested ranges on fold fronts; polje basins between limestone karst massifs
YE: Western monsoon escarpment; dissected plateau with basalt wadi canyons eastward
ZA: Great escarpment cliff over plateau; folded quartzite ranges on a narrow humid margin
ZM: Miombo uplands and rift scarps; wide wetlands above basalt river gorges
ZW: Quartzite ridge-and-valley east; kopjes on mopane savanna toward northern scarps
